gh_9b3b31360337cf3d5131badf.title: LeapXpert - Knowledge System Lead - Ho Chi Minh - FT
gh_9b3b31360337cf3d5131badf.description:
# **Knowledge Systems Lead (formerly Technical Writer)**

## Location 

* Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

---

## Salary Expectation 

* Competitive, based on experience

---

## Requirements

### Must Have

* Systems thinking mindset (designing scalable knowledge infrastructure)
* Strong written communication and content structuring skills
* Ability to identify inaccuracies, inconsistencies, and compliance risks in documentation
* Familiarity with version control and structured documentation workflows

### Ideally

* Experience in fintech, compliance, or regulated SaaS environments
* Familiarity with structured authoring (e.g., DITA, reusable content systems)
* Prompt engineering experience for documentation or knowledge systems
* Experience working closely with product managers and engineers

---

## Responsibilities

Great power comes with great responsibility — in this role, you’ll own how knowledge is created, structured, and scaled across the organization.

### You’ll be responsible for

* Designing and operating an end-to-end AI-assisted documentation pipeline
* Defining documentation toolchains (docs-as-code, versioning, publishing)
* Establishing and enforcing content standards across product squads
* Acting as a quality gate for AI-generated documentation (accuracy, compliance, consistency)
* Building and maintaining knowledge architecture and taxonomy
* Ensuring documentation is machine-readable and optimized for AI (RAG, search, chatbots)
* Embedding documentation into the product development lifecycle as a release requirement
* Enabling product squads to self-serve documentation through structured workflows

### You can bring

* Strong analytical thinking and ability to design scalable systems
* Attention to detail, especially in high-stakes or regulated environments
* Ability to operate in ambiguity and define processes from scratch
* Proactive mindset — identifying risks, not just gaps

---

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Work on cutting-edge AI + product infrastructure in a fast-growing global company
* Be part of a product-driven, agile organization with real ownership
* Collaborate with a diverse, international team
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Opportunities for career growth and learning new technologies
* Premium healthcare, flexible leave policy, and team activities

---

## Interesting Engineering Projects 
* Building an agentic AI-powered documentation pipeline
* Creating a machine-readable knowledge base for AI retrieval and grounding
* Designing scalable documentation systems across 15+ product squads
* Enabling zero-lag documentation shipping alongside product releases

---

## Contact

Homepage: [https://www.leapxpert.com/](https://www.leapxpert.com)
Contact recruiter for more details: Thao - 0399596647 (zalo/whatsapp)

gh_9b96130a0754d51d11da4a31.title: [Híbrido - Belo Horizonte] Full Stack Sênior | Golang na Onfly
gh_9b96130a0754d51d11da4a31.description:
Descrição da vaga

Para a vaga de Desenvolvedor(a) Full Stack Sênior | Golang, buscamos um(a) profissional com interesse e experiência em desenvolvimento Full Stack. Além disso, buscamos alguém que também seja dinâmico(a), que saiba trabalhar em equipe e que se conecte com nossa cultura e valores.

Local
Híbrido - Belo Horizonte 

Benefícios
Horário de trabalho flexível;
Vale refeição em cartão flexível R$35 (sem desconto de 6%);
Vale transporte em cartão flexível (sem desconto de 6%);
Plano de Saúde Unimed, sem coparticipação e sem mensalidade para o Onflyer (por nossa conta :D);
Plano Odontológico (desconto na mensalidade)
Desconto Farmácia;
No dress code;
Benefício de Psicoterapia on-line (Vittude);
Benefícios de academia! (Gympass);
Bolsa de 90% para estudos de idiomas;
Descontos em Graduações e Pós-graduações (UNA e UNIBH);
Assistência Funeral (Grupo Zelo);
Licença Maternidade/Paternidade estendida;
Voucher de R$200,00 no Onhappy (plataforma exclusiva para viajar com desconto para qualquer lugar do Brasil);
Seguro de vida.


Requisitos
Obrigatórios:

Experiência sólida em [Vue.js](http://vue.js/)
Experiência sólida em Go (Golang).
Profundo conhecimento dos paradigmas do Go, incluindo concorrência (goroutines, channels) e interfaces.
Experiência com frameworks e bibliotecas comuns do ecossistema Go (ex: Gin, Echo, Chi, GORM).
Experiência sólida na construção e otimização de APIs RESTful e (preferencialmente) gRPC.
Armazenamento de dados em bancos relacionais (ex: PostgreSQL, MySQL) e não-relacionais (ex: Redis).
Experiência prática com Docker.
Conhecimentos em boas práticas de arquitetura de software, especialmente Microsserviços e Sistemas Distribuídos.
Atenção para qualidade de código, testes unitários/integrados e design patterns.
Versionamento de códigos utilizando Git.
Experiência com metodologias de desenvolvimento ágil (Scrum ou Kanban)


projetos opensource
Contratação
CLT ou PJ 

Nossa empresa
A Onfly é uma startup focada em ajudar as empresas a viajarem melhor!
Democratizar a gestão de viagens, reembolsos, descontos em passagens, hotéis e locação de carros em uma experiência completa e simples é foco do nosso negócio.

Como se candidatar
Link: https://onfly.gupy.io/jobs/10273187

Tempo médio de feedbacks
Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 5 dias após cada processo. 

Labels
CLT
PJ
Hibrido
Sênior

gh_9bc0bda95b500affdf25e21a.title: 10up: Lead Web Engineer
gh_9bc0bda95b500affdf25e21a.description:
![10up-Logo-2019](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54147972/141860095-fd7b780c-a62c-4b63-8dfd-71410f84abbd.png)

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

Apply: https://10up.com/careers/lead-web-engineer/

Be a part of **something great**
**10up** is an award-winning full-service digital agency with a customer-centric service model and unrivaled leadership in open platforms and tools for digital makers and content creators. 10up’s services include user experience and interactive design, content strategy and creation, website and app engineering, SEO and online revenue strategy, and managed services. Our 250+ distributed team members provide end-to-end digital project expertise.

10up has a diverse client roster that includes Fortune 500 companies, influential content publishers, innovative startups, and impactful nonprofits. We’ve worked with some of the biggest names in the industry, such as Facebook, Google, Microsoft, Starbucks, ESPN, The New York Times Co., and Walmart.

10up has been leading the remote workforce movement for 10+ years. Our teams are distributed across six continents and 29 countries. All of our positions are fully remote (and always will be), and are open to applicants all around the world.

**Lead Web Engineers** have advanced knowledge of PHP and JavaScript and experience building large-scale performant applications. In addition to writing code, they are familiar with systems-level concepts. Lead Web Engineers being advanced in the skills of their discipline, they are also effective consultants and collaborators. They know how to balance a client’s needs, budget, and requirements. With knowledge of cutting edge techniques and an understanding of the constraints of scope and budget, a lead employee knows the possible ways to move forward and is able to select an appropriate technical approach for each client. A Lead Web Engineer is also expected to be a good communicator. They are skilled at providing actionable feedback and recommendations both internally to managers/teammates and externally to clients/vendors. Lead Web Engineers deliver successful projects by writing quality code, participating in important strategy conversations, and assisting with code reviews.

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

**Responsibilities**

- Develop complex WordPress plugins and/or themes primarily using PHP.
- Mentor engineers and provide code reviews.
- Drive strategy and lead back end technical vision for large projects.
- Leverage WordPress APIs and extend the WordPress admin experience.
- Solve complex problems in simple ways.
- Solve bugs and address client issues in a fast-paced environment.
- Juggle current projects with incoming tasks.
- Respond directly to clients courteously and clearly.
- Solve client challenges with understanding and empathy.
- Test solutions across multiple browsers and platforms in a local testing environment.
- Deploy changes to live servers.
- Assist in the remediation, enhancement, and maintenance of client sites.

**Requirements**

- At least five years experience in back end focused web development.
- Expert skills in: PHP, JavaScript, React.js, jQuery, WordPress, HTML, CSS.
- Ability to expertly debug performance and caching issues.
- Code portfolio. Link us to your GitHub account, upload a .zip, or both.
- Experience using Git.
- Ability to setup a local environment for testing PHP code.
- Proficiency in verbal and written English.
- Ability to communicate professionally with technical and non-technical colleagues and clients.

**Nice to have**

- Agency experience
- Remote experience

---
tags: #backend #lang-javascript #lang-php #level-lead #level-senior
